caption: A person's hands are seen opening a box of baseball cards on a table. The box is dark with "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC" printed in large white letters. In the initial frames, the person removes a clear plastic wrap from the top of the box. A small picture-in-picture window in the lower right shows a man wearing a black t-shirt watching the process. The table is covered with a green surface featuring a large orange and white logo that reads "JASPYS CASEBREAKS". In the lower frames, the person slides the inner contents of the box out, revealing more "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC" branding and a "Topps" logo. Additional on-screen text includes a web address "CASEBREAKS.com" located near the picture-in-picture window. The scene progresses from the initial removal of the packaging to the exposure of the product inside the box.
